name: 15q13_3_CHRNA7_region
description: 15q13.3 recurrent microdeletion region (BP4-BP5), flanked by paralogous SDs (LCR15s) containing CHRFAM7A (a hybrid CHRNA7/FAM7A paralog). Recurrent ~1.5 Mb deletions cause variable neurodevelopmental phenotype including intellectual disability, epilepsy, schizophrenia.

architecture.internal_structure: BP4 and BP5 SD blocks (~250 kb each, >99% identical) containing GOLGA8, CHRFAM7A, ARHGAP11B paralogs; CHRNA7 itself is the dosage-sensitive gene at the distal end.
